mapper.sql: id, project_id, name, plan_id, content, stats_snapshot, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user
mapper.select:
select
from functional_test_report where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into functional_test_report (id, project_id, name, plan_id, content, stats_snapshot, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{statsSnapshot,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
